project.name: MHR B2B client
project.description: My Health Record B2B client (Java 11, Jakarta XML Web Services)

requireFilesExist.message: This build requires the PCEHR WSDL/XSD tree under mhr.wsdl.resources.root (directory containing wsdl/External and binding/). Resolution order: -Dmhr.wsdl.resources.root, env MHR_WSDL_RESOURCES_ROOT, mhr.wsdl.resources.root from an active Maven user-settings profile, else default ${project.basedir}/wsdls/src/main/resources. Use -Pmhr-wsdl-artifact (depends on au.gov.nehta:mhr-wsdl) or -Dmhr.wsdl.codegen.skip=true when reusing generated sources under target/generated-sources/wsimport.
